summary: MN subsystem split PR from #2617. Loaded changed-file metadata and raw diff show a small `src/melee/mn/mnmain.c` change: one argument in `fn_8022AFEC` was changed from global `prev_menu` to `data->hovered_selection`, and local declaration order in `mn_8022B3A0` was adjusted, including moving `StaticModelDesc* top = &MenMainConTop_Top` before `PAD_STACK(16)`. A decomp-dev bot report recorded one unmatched-item improvement for `mn_8022B3A0` from 96.93% to 96.98%. Review feedback objected to a separate string-literal-to-variable replacement in `src/melee/mn/mnnamenew.c` as a regression.

key_files.role: Only file present in loaded changed-files metadata and raw diff; contains argument selection change in `fn_8022AFEC` and local declaration ordering changes in `mn_8022B3A0`.
Referenced by loaded review comment only; reviewer flagged replacing inline background asset string literals with `mnNameNew_803EE38C` as a regression.

what_changed.details: `fn_8022AFEC` now passes `data->hovered_selection` as the third argument to `mn_8022A440` instead of `mn_804A04F0.prev_menu`.
`mn_8022B3A0` local declarations were reordered: `StaticModelDesc* top = &MenMainConTop_Top` and `HSD_GObj* gobj` were moved earlier in the declaration block before later locals and `PAD_STACK(16)`.
decomp-dev reported one unmatched-item improvement for `main/melee/mn/mnmain` item `mn_8022B3A0`, from 96.93% to 96.98%; bytes column was 0.
Review comment shows a hunk where inline strings such as `"MenMainBack_Top_joint"` were replaced with `mnNameNew_803EE38C`; the reviewer called this a regression.

smart_moves.text: The PR was split by directory/subsystem so MN matching changes could be reviewed in isolation.
The author recorded slice-local hygiene checks, including creation from `origin/master` and `git diff --check origin/master...HEAD` passing.

decomp_lessons.lesson: String literals used as asset or resource labels should not be replaced by address-style variables merely to chase data or relocation behavior; reviewers may treat that as a regression.

Local declaration ordering, including moving initialized locals before `PAD_STACK`, can be a narrow matching tactic, but the PR evidence only supports that it improved `mn_8022B3A0` slightly; it does not establish a general style rule.

naming_conventions.text: The review evidence favors preserving literal asset/resource names such as `"MenMainBack_Top_joint"` at call sites rather than hiding them behind generated address-style names like `mnNameNew_803EE38C` when data ownership is not established.
No supported semantic rename convention for `fn_8022AFEC`, `mn_8022B3A0`, or related locals can be inferred from this slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: A small score improvement in `mn_8022B3A0` coincided with declaration-order changes and placement of `StaticModelDesc* top = &MenMainConTop_Top` earlier in the local list before `PAD_STACK(16)`.
`PAD_STACK(16)` is present in the touched function, but the diff does not add or remove it; no new general PAD_STACK tactic is proven by this PR.

Changing `mn_8022A440`'s third argument from global menu state `mn_804A04F0.prev_menu` to `data->hovered_selection` is part of the diff, but the loaded slice does not explain the intended semantics beyond the code change.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.comment: Replacing the string with the variable is a regression as mentioned on other PRs.
review_feedback.interpretation: Reviewer objected to replacing inline strings like `"MenMainBack_Top_joint"` with a variable such as `mnNameNew_803EE38C`.

The PR was closed with `merged_at` null, so no merge/acceptance outcome is inferred.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Do not replace menu asset string literals with generated variables during code matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2626, review feedback on `src/melee/mn/mnnamenew.c` called replacing inline strings such as `"MenMainBack_Top_joint"` with `mnNameNew_803EE38C` a regression. This aligns with the loaded standards that ordinary asset/resource string literals should remain inline unless data ownership evidence and PR scope justify symbolizing them.

source_update_candidates.title: Use PR #2626 as an example for no string-literal symbol regression
source_update_candidates.text: Potential example: reviewer flagged replacing `"MenMainBack_Top_joint"` and related inline menu asset strings with `mnNameNew_803EE38C` as a regression. This can serve as historical evidence for keeping ordinary asset/resource string literals inline in code-matching PRs.
source_update_candidates.reason: The feedback directly supports the existing standard and may be useful as a concrete historical PR example.

rejection_notes: Do not treat the PR body's six-file list as the actual loaded changed-file set; loaded changed-files metadata contains only `src/melee/mn/mnmain.c`.
Do not claim `mn_8022B3A0` matched; the bot report only says one unmatched item improved from 96.93% to 96.98%.
Do not infer reviewer intent beyond the explicit string-to-variable regression comment.
Do not promote declaration reordering around `PAD_STACK(16)` as a general accepted tactic from this slice alone.
